---
title: "My Projects"
---
## Bachelor Thesis

#### About


#### Research Proposal

  <img src="assets/_project_pictures/_bt_lr.jpg" width="40%">
</a>

> *Commming Soon...*

## New Enterprise Development 

#### About


#### Concept Paper
<a href="assets/_projects/_concept_paper.pdf">
  <img src="assets/_project_pictures/_ft_cp.jpg" width="40%">
</a>

<a href="assets/_projects/_feasibility_report.pdf">
  <img src="assets/_project_pictures/_ft_fr.jpg" width="40%">
</a>

<a href="assets/_projects/_marketing_report.pdf">
  <img src="assets/_project_pictures/_ft_mr.jpg" width="40%">
</a>

  <img src="assets/_project_pictures/_ft_mv.jpg" width="40%">
</a>

> *Commming Soon...*

## Machine Learning & Advanced Python 

#### About 


#### Using Classification Algorithms in Heart Disease Prediction 


> *Commming Soon...*
